dashboard.suggestion: Keep going with your next lesson.
dashboard.continueLearningDesc: Pick up where you left off
dashboard.noEnrolledCourses: No enrolled courses yet. Browse the
dashboard.pildorasDesc: 5–10 min microlearning, perfect for spare moments
dashboard.pildorasEmpty: No pills available yet. Check back later.
dashboard.enrolledEmpty: You're not enrolled in any courses yet.
dashboard.recentlyViewedDesc: Courses you've visited but haven't enrolled in yet
dashboard.recentlyViewedEmpty: You haven't visited any courses yet. Explore the catalogue to discover content.
dashboard.recommendedForYouDesc: Based on the categories of your courses and what's most popular on the platform
dashboard.recommendedForYouEmpty: Enrol in a course to start receiving recommendations.
dashboard.newsDesc: The most recently added courses in the catalogue
dashboard.newsEmpty: No new courses available right now.
dashboard.recCompletedDesc: Recommendations based on the courses you've already completed
dashboard.recCompletedEmpty: Finish your courses to start receiving recommendations
dashboard.recommendedDesc: Personalised to your role, interests and activity
dashboard.completedEmpty: You haven't completed any courses yet.

users.title: User management
users.desc: Create, edit and remove users from your company.
users.card_create_desc: Manually add a new user to the company.
users.card_upload_desc: Import users from a CSV file.

courses.title: Course management
courses.desc: Manage the catalogue of courses available to your company.
courses.card_create_desc: Manually add a new course to the company.
courses.card_categories_desc: Organise the catalogue into SmartMind categories.
courses.card_limits_desc: Manage companies and the maximum number of students per company.
courses.card_loader_desc: Import courses from a SharePoint folder.
courses.card_restore_desc: Restore a course from a backup file (.mbz).

categories.title: Catalogue categories
categories.desc: Create and edit the categories shown in the SmartMind catalogue.

upload.title: Bulk upload users
upload.desc: Upload a CSV file to bulk-create users or update existing ones.
upload.downloadSampleDesc: Download a sample CSV with the required columns and two example rows you can replace with your own data.

othermgmt.title: Other management
othermgmt.desc: Advanced functions to manage your company, its users and the SmartMind catalogue.
othermgmt.card_courseMgmt_desc: Create and edit the courses available to your company.
othermgmt.card_courseLoader_desc: Import courses from a SharePoint folder.
othermgmt.card_userUpload_desc: Bulk-create users from a CSV file.
othermgmt.card_statistics_desc: Usage and progress metrics for the company.
othermgmt.card_companyDetails_desc: Edit your company name, logo and contact info.
othermgmt.card_departments_desc: Organise users into departments within the company.
othermgmt.card_emailTemplates_desc: Customise the automatic emails sent to your users.
othermgmt.card_companyCourses_desc: Manage which catalogue courses your company can access.

mycourses.title: My Courses
mycourses.desc: Manage your training and continue where you left off.

certificates.title: My Certificates
certificates.desc: Diplomas earned by completing courses. Downloadable and verifiable.

course_page.redirect_message: This activity opens in a new window.
course_page.video_unsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.

landing.unenrol_confirm: Are you sure you want to unenrol from this course? Your progress will be lost.
landing.activity_url_hint_genially: Paste the Genially embed URL (e.g. https://view.genial.ly/...)
landing.activity_url_hint_video: YouTube, Vimeo or direct video URL (mp4, webm…)
landing.video_upload_hint: File upload will take you to Moodle's standard form.
landing.delete_activity_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

adminCompanyLimits.heading: Companies & limits
adminCompanyLimits.help: Set the maximum number of students per company. 0 = unlimited.

adminSettings.title: Site administration
adminSettings.desc: Manage the SmartMind platform from one place.
adminSettings.usersDesc: Create, edit and assign users to companies.
adminSettings.limitsDesc: Configure quotas and restrictions per client.
adminSettings.updatesDesc: Check and install new plugin versions.
adminSettings.iomadIndexDesc: Global view of the IOMAD module.
adminSettings.companyUsersDesc: Assign users to companies and departments.
adminSettings.companyLicensesDesc: Assign licenses and seats per company.
adminSettings.themeDesc: Customise colors, logos and look & feel.
adminSettings.searchDesc: Full access to Moodle's classic admin.

iomad.heading: Administration
iomad.no_cards: No options available for your account.

iomadDashboard.desc: Full IOMAD admin dashboard: companies, licenses, users and multi-tenant reporting.

editor.new_course_desc: Create a new course or pill in the SmartMind catalogue.
editor.edit_course_desc: Update the course details, metadata and learning objectives.
editor.is_pill_help: Tick this box if the content is a SmartMind pill (microlearning short course). Off by default — every new course starts as a regular course.
editor.course_image_help: JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF. The picked file replaces the current image when you save the course.
editor.tip_companies: IOMAD companies this course is assigned to. Users in each company will see it in their dashboard.
editor.tip_idnumber: Optional external code to identify the course in third-party systems (ERP, SEPE, etc.).
editor.tip_visible: If hidden, only admins can see the course. Learners won't find it in the catalogue.
editor.tip_enablecompletion: Enables progress tracking (bars, percentages) for enrolled learners.
editor.tip_format: Determines how course sections are organised (by topic, weekly, etc.).
editor.tip_numsections: Number of sections created in the course. You can add more later.
editor.tip_lang: Forces Moodle's interface language when a learner accesses this course.
editor.tip_startdate: Date from which the course becomes available to learners.
editor.tip_enddate: Date after which the course is no longer available. Leave empty for no limit.
editor.tip_course_image: Course cover image shown in the catalogue and on the course page.
editor.create_course_desc: Fill in the course details, metadata and structure.
editor.course_structure_hint: Pre-define sections and activities. You can also add them later from the course page.
editor.create_deferred_hint: The activity will be created with default settings. You can configure it later from the course page.
editor.tip_duration_hours: Total course duration in hours. Shown in the catalogue and on the course page.
editor.tip_level: Difficulty level shown to learners (Beginner, Medium, Advanced).
editor.tip_completion_pct: Minimum percentage of activities the learner must complete to pass the course.
editor.tip_category: SmartMind catalogue category where the course will appear.
editor.tip_smartmind_code: Internal SmartMind code used to identify the course in reports and catalogues.
editor.tip_sepe_code: Official SEPE code linked to the course (subsidised training).
editor.tip_description: Public course description shown on the catalogue and course page. Rich text supported.
editor.tip_objectives: List of learning objectives the learner will achieve after completing the course. Drag to reorder.

siteadmin.heading: Site administration
siteadmin.description: Configure the SmartMind plugin settings or open Moodle's full admin panel.

restore.landing_desc: Use a backup to restore a previous version of a course, or create a new course.
restore.landing_dropzone_hint: You can drag and drop files here to add them
restore.zone_course_desc: Backup files belonging to this course.
restore.zone_user_desc: Private backup files for all courses, with user information anonymized.
restore.confirm_section_note: Included in the backup (without user information)
restore.sharepoint_extras_desc: These files will be imported alongside the course (SCORMs, PDFs, evaluations).
restore.sharepoint_extras_drag_hint: Drag any resource onto a section to add it to the restored course.
restore.activity_deferred_hint: This activity will be created blank with the name you entered. You can finish configuring it in Moodle after the restore completes.
restore.apply_extras_partial: Some SharePoint extras could not be applied
restore.tip_fullname: Full course name. Shown in lists, catalogue and course page.
restore.tip_shortname: Short, unique course identifier (no spaces). Used in URLs and internal references.
restore.tip_startdate: Date the course becomes available to learners.
restore.title: Restore a course from a backup
restore.complete_desc: The course was created successfully. The description and objectives are being auto-translated into the other languages; this takes a few seconds.
restore.upload_desc: Upload an MBZ Moodle backup or arrive here from the SharePoint loader.
restore.destination_desc: Choose where to restore the course.
restore.dest_merge_label: Merge the backup course into the existing course
restore.dest_delete_label: Delete the contents of the existing course and then restore
restore.dest_too_many_results: Too many results, please type a more specific search.
restore.settings_desc: Customize what to include in the restore. Settings locked by the backup cannot be overridden.
restore.schema_desc: Toggle sections and activities, rename them, and set the SmartMind metadata.
restore.review_desc: Review every choice before executing the restore.

courseloader.title: SharePoint course loader
courseloader.subtitle: Paste a SharePoint folder URL to analyse its contents and import the course automatically.

catalogue.noResults: No courses found matching your search.

categories.image_help: JPEG, PNG or WebP. Recommended 400×250 px.
categories.name: Name

comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!

restore.complete_desc: The course has been restored successfully.
restore.destination_desc: Choose where to restore the course.
restore.schema_desc: Select which sections and activities to include.

restore.upload_desc: Upload a Moodle backup file (.mbz) to restore a course.

upload.file_help: CSV file with the required columns.
